description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno City Hall offers internet services available 24 hours a day, including electronic applications and notifications, My Number Portal, and public facility reservation systems.

We also provide convenient services you can use without visiting City Hall in person: obtaining certificates at convenience stores using your My Number Card, viewing urban planning and hazard maps through Hanno City GIS (Geographic Information System), and receiving information via email distribution service.

Report road damage by phone (#9910), LINE, or electronic application system any time, day or night. For procedures like moving into the city or marriage registration, check the "Hanno City Procedures Navigator." You can view waiting times at the Citizen Affairs counter on "Neko no Me Dot Com" and register for call notifications.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/johosystem/13006.html
